series_metadata.series_description: Includes project activity narrative, budget data, assurances, and student participation data.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five years after grant closes, and after state audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain five years after grant closes, and after state audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
